The Advanced Protein Analysis Laboratory, established with the support of the Istanbul Development Agency, aims to enable researchers' experimental studies to develop products and services that will contribute to the industry. In our laboratory, researches are carried out in the fields of microbial biotechnology and microbiology, and it is planned that these researches will contribute both to the literature with new information and discoveries and to the industry with the products obtained.

Services offered in our laboratory:

Enzyme activity determination studies for industry
